title: Irish Kid-Friendly Wrap
description: A simple and tasty wrap perfect for kids, featuring Irish beef and floral flavors.

ingredients.name: Beef mince
ingredients.notes: Irish beef for a traditional flavor

instructions: Prepare the beef mince by cooking it in a pan until browned.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened.
Roll out the wrap dough to desired thickness.
Place the cooked beef mixture onto one half of the wrap.
Add the shredded cheese, chopped tomato, and lettuce on top.
Fold the other half of the wrap over to enclose the filling.
Brush the edges with a little water and press to seal.
Place the wrap on a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
